title: Support & Guides
description: Guides, the helpline assistant, and the guided tour on every page.

steps.title: Guides
steps.description: User, technical and portal guides, downloadable as PDF.
steps.voiceScript: The guides cover the platform end to end and download as PDF.
steps.captionText: The guides cover the platform end to end and download as PDF.
steps.fallbackMessage: Guides: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Every page teaches itself
steps.description: Help & Tutorial sits on every page.
steps.voiceScript: On any page, Help and Tutorial runs a guided tour, an auto demo, or asks the assistant to explain the page.
steps.captionText: On any page, Help and Tutorial runs a guided tour, an auto demo, or asks the assistant to explain the page.
steps.fallbackMessage: Every page teaches itself: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Record your own video
steps.description: The Record button exports the demo as .webm.
steps.voiceScript: During a demo you can record the screen and export it as a video file.
steps.captionText: During a demo you can record the screen and export it as a video file.
steps.fallbackMessage: Record your own video: not visible on this screen yet.
